blocks.text:
It seems like you've made some changes to support the Ollama provider in your Rust project. You added new code for handling the Ollama client and updated various parts of the API to recognize this new provider. If you're testing if Ollama is working correctly, one way would be to run a test that specifically targets the Ollama model.

Given the tests, it looks like there's already an integration test in place (`send_message_uses_ollama_endpoint_without_api_key`) for ensuring that messages are sent through the correct endpoint when using the Ollama provider. However, if you want to verify this further or add more checks, we can do so.

Would you like me to help you run a specific test, or should I assist with adding another check? Alternatively, if you need any other kind of assistance related to testing or running your project, please let me know!
